codeReview.summary: Commit 34e3832 ports the CASH core package into apps/trading/src/cash with all required file groups present (6 lib files, 14 hooks matching web/hooks source, historical candle data, env wiring, deps, and barrel exports), and the import/env adaptations are applied consistently.

issues.description: Panora API key is hardcoded in client-side source. Shared knowledge in .factory/library/panora-api-auth-requirement.md says this key should be kept in environment configuration rather than hardcoded client code.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture/docs still state that cash/hooks contains 15 hooks, but the source-of-truth web/hooks directory has 14 files and this feature correctly ports those 14. This mismatch can create false failures during review.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:49 says "15 React hooks"; web/hooks directory listing shows 14 files; commit 34e3832 adds 14 files under apps/trading/src/cash/hooks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fork-worker verification instructions are misaligned with this mission's scoped validation model and can direct workers to inappropriate full-repo checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fork-worker/SKILL.md:51 requires `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test`; .factory/services.yaml:3 and :5 define scoped typecheck/test commands; transcript skeleton for session 1c5701fc-7a08-45f6-b21e-b2f0cea52d2e contains the scoped test command and no agent-browser step.

summary: Reviewed feature port-core-lib-and-hooks via handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff. The feature meets its implementation goals and is marked pass; one non-blocking security/config issue (hardcoded Panora key) and two shared-state gaps (hook-count drift and skill validation guidance drift) were recorded.
